text:
LWR_DRSNG_INTRM_CD LWR_DRSNG_INTRM_CD GG0130G5 Lower body dressing (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to dress and undress below the waist; including fasteners, if applicable (excluding footwear) during the assessment period plus two previous calendar days. 06=Independent 
05=Setup or clean-up assistance 
04=Supervision or touching assistance 
03=Partial/moderate assistance 
02=Substantial/maximal assistance 
01=Dependent 

If activity was not attempted, code
